title: Shiva
subTitle: Shiva is a brave and intelligent child who stays with his grandparents in Vedas City. He sets out with his gang of friends to save the citizens from all sorts of evil.

title: Pak Pakau
subTitle: Follow the whimsical and absurd conversations of two friends and learn new things as they navigate life's everyday mysteries.

title: Pakdam Pakdai
subTitle: There is a constant war between Doggy Don and the three clever mice who live in his house. However, with the help of Doggy Don's brother, an ex-army dog, they fight the mice to win back their house.

title: Zig & Sharko
subTitle: Zig the hyena lives all alone on a desert island and schemes to eat Marina.

title: Zig & Sharko
subTitle: Zig the hyena lives all alone on a desert island and schemes to eat Marina.

title: Pakdam Pakdai Space Attack!
subTitle: Doggy Don and his elder brother Cornell, along with the mice brothers, set out to fight against an alien monkey that plans to attack the earth.

title: Zig & Sharko
subTitle: Zig the hyena lives all alone on a desert island and schemes to eat Marina.

title: PINAKI & HAPPY IN FLAMES KI HERA-PHERI
subTitle: Darrnayak's magical flame suddenly goes missing. However, Happy and Pinaki strive to find it and prove Colonel Suri's innocence.

title: PINAKI & HAPPY IN THE DARK HOUR
subTitle: Pinaki and Happy face a race against time during the Dark Hour, striving to stop Chandoola from stealing the Crown Flame and plunging Bhoot World into eternal darkness.

title: Zig & Bernie
subTitle: Accompanied by his best friend Bernie, a hermit crab, Zig, a hyena, embarks on a series of schemes to capture Marina, a mermaid. But his plans are thwarted by a cunning shark.

title: Shiva Vs Crime Time
subTitle: Crime Time, an infamous villain who manipulates time, steals Prof Botnik's soldier robot commander. When Shiva confronts him, he locks him up in a box for 10 years!
